testcase.name: Successfully register a new user
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the signup page............................................passed When User fills the registration form with details from signup properties...passed And User accepts the terms and clicks Create Account........................passed Then User should see a success message or be redirected to the dashboard....passed

testcase.name: Successfully request a password reset link
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the forgot password page...................................passed When User enters email from "signup" properties and clicks Send Reset Link..passed Then User should see a confirmation for the reset link......................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.name: Valid user logs in and creates a new client
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed And User navigates to client creation page and adds new client..............passed

testcase.name: Create a new contact under an existing client
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to client section and adds a new contact................passed Then New contact should be created successfully.............................passed

testcase.name: Add a new note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user adds a note for client.............................................passed

testcase.name: Edit the existing note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user edits the note for client..........................................passed

testcase.name: Delete the note
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user deletes the note for client........................................passed

testcase.name: Upload a new document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user uploads a document for client......................................passed

testcase.name: Delete the uploaded document
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to clientInDetailView...................................passed When user navigates to engagement for client................................passed And user deletes the document for client....................................passed

testcase.name: Navigate to client and edit two fields
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When user navigates to first client.........................................passed And user clicks edit button on client.......................................passed And user edits two fields of client.........................................passed And user scrolls and saves client changes...................................passed
